iran_nuke.notes: Day 15 23:00 — ELEVATED STABLE. No new nuclear-specific signals. New: Iran Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei reportedly wounded/disfigured per Hegseth (AJ). US offers $10M reward for info on Khamenei and top officials. Iran casualty count now 1,444 killed, 18,551 injured. Leadership decapitation pressure could increase nuclear desperation calculus long-term but no weapons-grade enrichment or test signal yet. 14 + 12 (hidden HEU) = 26.

iran_conventional.notes: Day 15 23:00 — IMMINENT STABLE. NEW: (1) Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei reportedly wounded and likely disfigured per Hegseth (AJ). US State Dept offers $10M reward. (2) Iran casualties: 1,444 killed, 18,551 injured since Feb 28 (AJ). (3) Saudi Arabia intercepted 6 drones — 5 in eastern region, 1 over Empty Quarter. (4) Central Tehran strikes continue, IRGC says it coordinated latest missile/drone launch at Israel with Hezbollah for al-Quds Day. (5) Asia rationing fossil fuels due to Gulf conflict (Reuters). Iran claims missile capacity 'down 90%' but attacks sustained. Capped at 100.

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 15 23:00 — IMMINENT STABLE. IRGC says coordinated latest missile/drone at Israel with Hezbollah for al-Quds Day — joint operation continues. Lebanon negotiation track still developing. No new signals. 92 (stable).

turkey.notes: IMMINENT STABLE. Turkey and China both mediating Pak-Afghan conflict (AP). No new intercept events. Turkey role as mediator may slightly reduce escalation pressure. 65 + 6 (Iran coupling) = 71.

india.notes: ELEVATED STABLE. India remains diplomatically engaged. Asian energy rationing may affect India's energy security. No military escalation signals. 20 (stable).

russia.notes: CRITICAL STABLE. Russia wants to control Zaporizhzhia nuclear power plant (Reuters). US eases sanctions on Russian oil (Reuters). Russia continues to benefit from $100+ oil amid Gulf disruption. 42 (stable).

china.notes: DETERRENT STABLE. China mediating Pakistan-Afghanistan — Wang Yi call with Muttaqi, now Turkey also mediating (AP). China reducing fossil fuel consumption faster via electrification (Reuters). No new signals. 15 (stable).

north_korea.notes: CRITICAL STABLE. 10+ ballistic missiles confirmed by Reuters, Bloomberg, NBC — launched from Sunan area near Pyongyang, flew ~350km into East Sea. Third provocation this week during US-SK 'Freedom Shield' drills. Confirmed by 4+ sources. No further launches. 41 (stable).

russia_ukraine.notes: CRITICAL STABLE. NEW: Russia intends to control Zaporizhzhia nuclear plant operations, willing to sell electricity to Ukraine (Reuters). Russia hammered Ukraine with missiles and drones Saturday — 6 killed (Reuters). Ukraine sending drone interceptor experts to help US bases in Jordan against Iranian drones (ISW). 56 + 5 (coupling) = 61.

pakistan_afghanistan.notes: IMMINENT RISING — DAY 15 23:00. MAJOR ESCALATION: (1) Pakistan retaliates — PAF strikes Afghan drone storage facility in Kandahar Province (AP). (2) Islamabad airspace SHUT — 5 blasts reported, flights diverted, PAF scrambled jets (ABP Live). (3) Pakistan strikes signal Afghan territory cannot be used for cross-border attacks. (4) Turkey also mediating alongside China (AP). (5) Pakistan injured 4 civilians (Quetta) from intercepted drone debris. Cycle escalating: Afghan drones → Pakistan retaliatory strikes → Afghan drone claims on Islamabad. 25 + 60 + 3 (coupling) + 4 (new signals) = 92.

ISLAMABAD AIRSPACE SHUT — 5 blasts, flights diverted, PAF scrambles jets after Afghan drone siege (ABP Live)
SUPREME LEADER KHAMENEI WOUNDED — Hegseth says Mojtaba Khamenei 'wounded and likely disfigured.' US offers $10M reward (AJ)
IRAN CASUALTIES: 1,444 KILLED — 18,551 injured since Feb 28 in US-Israel strikes (AJ)
RUSSIA WANTS ZAPORIZHZHIA NUCLEAR PLANT — Rosatom head says Russia intends to control plant operations (Reuters)
DPRK FIRES 10+ BALLISTIC MISSILES — From Sunan area near Pyongyang, 350km range, third provocation this week (Reuters/Bloomberg/NBC)
SAUDI INTERCEPTS 6 IRANIAN DRONES — 5 in eastern region, 1 over Empty Quarter desert (AJ)
ASIA RATIONING FOSSIL FUELS — Countries across energy-hungry Asia rationing supplies due to Gulf conflict (Reuters)

changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: ESCALATION DETECTED: (1) PAKISTAN-AFGHANISTAN — Pakistan retaliates with PAF strikes on Kandahar drone storage. Islamabad airspace shut after 5 blasts, PAF jets scrambled. Cycle intensifying: Afghan drones hit capital → Pakistan strikes back inside Afghanistan. Score 88→92. (2) IRAN — Supreme Leader reportedly wounded, US offers $10M reward. Leadership decapitation pressure increasing. 1,444 killed. (3) RUSSIA-UKRAINE — Russia moves to control Zaporizhzhia nuclear plant. GLOBAL: 75% IMMINENT. SIX trackers IMMINENT: Iran conventional (100), Israel-Lebanon (92), Pakistan-Afghanistan (92), Turkey (65/71). THREE CRITICAL: Russia-Ukraine (56/61), Russia (42/50), DPRK (41). WATCH: (a) Pakistan-Afghanistan spiral — PAF inside Afghanistan now, open war threshold approaching. (b) Supreme Leader status — wounded leader + decapitation pressure = desperation risk. (c) Zaporizhzhia nuclear plant control — Russia asserting nuclear infrastructure dominance. (d) Asian energy rationing — economic pressure mounting globally.

latest_news.headline: PAF strikes Afghan drone storage facility in Kandahar — Pakistan retaliates
latest_news.text: Pakistan's air force struck an Afghan military facility in Kandahar Province that was allegedly used to launch drone attacks into Pakistan. State media says strikes signal Afghan territory cannot be used for cross-border attacks.

latest_news.headline: Islamabad airspace shut — 5 blasts, PAF scrambles jets after drone siege
latest_news.text: Several blasts rocked Islamabad, airspace shut, flights diverted to other cities. Pakistan Air Force scrambled fighter jets. 5 blasts reported in capital area.

latest_news.headline: Zardari: Taliban 'crossed a red line' with drone attacks on Pakistan
latest_news.text: Pakistan President Zardari warned Taliban government that drone attacks on civilian areas crossed a 'red line.' Pakistan intercepted 'rudimentary drones' — debris injured 4 in Quetta.

latest_news.headline: Iran Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei reportedly wounded — US offers $10M reward
latest_news.text: US SecDef Hegseth says Iran's new Supreme Leader is 'wounded and likely disfigured.' State Dept offers $10M reward for information about Khamenei and top officials.

latest_news.headline: Iran war casualties: 1,444 killed, 18,551 injured since Feb 28
latest_news.text: At least 1,444 people killed and 18,551 injured in US-Israel strikes on Iran since the war began on February 28.

latest_news.headline: Russia intends to control Zaporizhzhia nuclear power plant
latest_news.text: Rosatom head says Russia intends to control the relaunch and operation of Zaporizhzhia nuclear power plant when safe, willing to discuss selling electricity to Ukraine.

latest_news.headline: North Korea fires 10+ ballistic missiles from near Pyongyang
latest_news.text: ~10 ballistic missiles launched from Sunan area near Pyongyang toward East Sea. Flew ~350km. Third provocation this week during US-SK 'Freedom Shield' exercises.

latest_news.headline: Asia rationing fossil fuels amid Gulf conflict — energy crisis deepens
latest_news.text: Countries across energy-hungry Asia are rationing supplies or exports of fossil fuels in response to the Gulf conflict. Oil prices remain elevated.

outlook: CRITICAL IMMINENT — Global war probability 75% IMMINENT (Day 15 23:00). ESCALATION: (1) PAKISTAN-AFGHANISTAN — PAF strikes inside Afghanistan (Kandahar drone storage). Islamabad airspace shut, 5 blasts, PAF jets scrambled. Cycle intensifying. Score 88→92. (2) IRAN — Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei reportedly wounded/disfigured. US offers $10M reward. 1,444 killed, 18,551 injured. (3) RUSSIA-UKRAINE — Russia moves to control Zaporizhzhia nuclear plant. 6 killed in latest Russian missile/drone barrage on Ukraine. (4) DPRK — 10+ ballistic missiles confirmed by 4+ sources, third provocation this week. (5) ASIAN ENERGY CRISIS — Countries rationing fossil fuels. SIX trackers IMMINENT: Iran conventional (100), Israel-Lebanon (92), Pakistan-Afghanistan (92), Turkey (65/71). THREE CRITICAL: Russia-Ukraine (56/61), Russia (42/50), DPRK (41). WATCH: (a) Pakistan-Afghanistan — PAF inside Afghanistan, open war threshold approaching. (b) Supreme Leader status — wounded leader = desperation + nuclear calculus. (c) Zaporizhzhia NPP — Russia asserting nuclear infrastructure control. (d) Asian energy rationing — cascading economic impact. (e) Iran attacks sustained despite '90% degradation' claim — capability vs. reporting gap?
